steps.title: Identify the key signal about visibility
steps.content: The passage explicitly states that architectural tourists “can easily recognize” how the Santa Fe Depot's style “draws inspiration from the Spanish missions.” This shows the Spanish influence is obvious and readily perceptible.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Palpable means “easily perceived or obvious,” matching the passage's evidence that architectural tourists can readily recognize the Spanish influence.

The other three either contradict the “easily recognize” signal (understated means subtle; disputed means contested) or don't fit the context (corroborated isn't used to describe something existing throughout a region).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
